ns0:subsection.ns0:heading: General rule
ns0:subsection.ns0:chapeau: For purposes of part V of subchapter B of chapter 1 and those provisions of this title which refer to this subsection—

ns0:paragraph.ns0:content: the determination of whether an individual is married shall be made as of the close of his taxable year; except that if his spouse dies during his taxable year such determination shall be made as of the time of such death; and
an individual legally separated from his spouse under a decree of divorce or of separate maintenance shall not be considered as married.

ns0:subsection.ns0:heading: Certain married individuals living apart
ns0:subsection.ns0:chapeau: For purposes of those provisions of this title which refer to this subsection, if—

ns0:paragraph.ns0:content: an individual who is married (within the meaning of subsection (a)) and who files a separate return maintains as his home a household which constitutes for more than one-half of the taxable year the principal place of abode of a child (within the meaning of section 152(f)(1)) with respect to whom such individual is entitled to a deduction for the taxable year under section 151 (or would be so entitled but for section 152(e)),
such individual furnishes over one-half of the cost of maintaining such household during the taxable year, and
during the last 6 months of the taxable year, such individual’s spouse is not a member of such household,

ns0:subsection.ns0:continuation: such individual shall not be considered as married.

ns0:note.ns0:heading: Prior Provisions
ns0:note.ns0:p: Provisions relating to determination of marital status were formerly contained in section 143 of this title, prior to enactment of this section by Pub. L. 99–514.

ns0:note.ns0:heading: Amendments
ns0:note.ns0:p: 2004—Subsec. (b)(1). Pub. L. 108–311 substituted “152(f)(1)” for “151(c)(3)” and struck out “paragraph (2) or (4) of” before “section 152(e)),”.

ns0:note.ns0:heading: Effective Date of 2004 Amendment
ns0:note.ns0:p: Amendment by Pub. L. 108–311 applicable to taxable years beginning after Dec. 31, 2004, see section 208 of Pub. L. 108–311, set out as a note under section 2 of this title.

ns0:note.ns0:heading: Effective Date of 1988 Amendment
ns0:note.ns0:p: Amendment by Pub. L. 100–647 effective, except as otherwise provided, as if included in the provision of the Tax Reform Act of 1986, Pub. L. 99–514, to which such amendment relates, see section 1019(a) of Pub. L. 100–647, set out as a note under section 1 of this title.

ns0:note.ns0:heading: Effective Date
ns0:note.ns0:p: Section applicable to bonds issued after Aug. 15, 1986, except as otherwise provided, see sections 1311 to 1318 of Pub. L. 99–514, set out as an Effective Date; Transitional Rules note under section 141 of this title.
